gaps.note: This run was migrated from a pre-restructure flat output file to demonstrate the output layout. It is scoped to the four sources documented in the original turf_lead_data_sources.md (SRC-001..SRC-004: Leander ISD and Round Rock ISD); all 11 leads reference only those sources, so sources.json and leads.json are internally consistent. A separate, broader historical run (~41 sources) existed but its source records were never committed, so it was not migrated.
